backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder for backend canister logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: team members and mentors hyperlinks in the About section, both with high confidence and mapped to test IDs REQ-1 and REQ-2.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing the Cariesrisk AI promotional website structure, components, styling, and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a dental-themed color system using OKLCH values for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Cariesrisk AI application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component orchestrating the page layout with Header, Hero, Features, About, CallToAction, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying mission statement, benefits list with checkmarks, and hyperlinks for team members and mentors with decorative tooth illustration.
frontend/src/components/CallToAction.tsx: CTA section encouraging demo requests and sales contact with buttons linking to external demo URL, plus fast setup and HIPAA compliance highlights.
frontend/src/components/Features.tsx: Features section displaying six cards with icons and descriptions highlighting AI analysis, risk assessment, early detection, and preventive care capabilities.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with logo, navigation links, company info sections, copyright notice, and caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with Cariesrisk AI logo, navigation menu for Features/About/Contact sections, and stethoscope icon.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section with gradient background, headline about pediatric dental disease prediction, CTA buttons, and statistics cards showing accuracy, assessments, and dental practices.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, automatically invalidating and refetching dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file reserved for React Query hooks for backend integration; currently empty as no backend methods are implemented.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a mint green and white dental theme for both light and dark modes, including colors for UI components, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the theme with custom colors using OKLCH color space, custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), border radius variables, shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document showing two pending feature requests to add team members and mentors hyperlinks in the About Us section of a website.
